scripts.lint: concurrently -n "engine,backend,frontend" -c "blue,magenta,cyan" "yarn workspace @daicer/engine lint" "yarn workspace @daicer/backend lint" "yarn workspace @daicer/frontend lint"
scripts.typecheck: concurrently -n "engine,backend,frontend" -c "blue,magenta,cyan" "yarn workspace @daicer/engine typecheck" "yarn workspace @daicer/backend typecheck" "yarn workspace @daicer/frontend typecheck"
scripts.test: concurrently -n "engine,backend,frontend" -c "blue,magenta,cyan" "yarn workspace @daicer/engine test" "yarn workspace @daicer/backend test" "yarn workspace @daicer/frontend test"
